notes: Pairwise accuracy counts learned-cost ties as incorrect when the physical gap exceeds threshold.
NDCG uses per-pool linear relevance max(C_real_state) - C_real_state, so lower physical cost is more relevant.
Endpoint pool-range restriction filters Track A endpoint rows to each pool's [min C_real_state, max C_real_state].

summary_table_markdown:
| Metric | C_model | V1 oracle | Random |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Pairwise accuracy (gap>5) | 55.8% | 72.7% | 50.4% |
| Pairwise accuracy (gap>10) | 57.3% | 83.0% | 49.0% |
| Pairwise accuracy (gap>20) | 56.4% | 98.6% | 50.5% |
| NDCG@10 | 0.630 | 0.862 | 0.610 |
| NDCG@30 | 0.665 | 0.878 | 0.647 |
| R_endpoint (full) | 0.473 | - | - |
| R_endpoint (pool-range restricted) | 0.189 | - | - |
| R_pool | 0.084 | 0.666 | 0.004 |
